sys_security_acl.description: *This ACL only runs if the Tanium Self-Service Deploy application is installed* Allow self-service users to see: 1. Deploy packages that are self-service installable with no role restrictions 2. Deploy packages that are self-service installable WITH role restrictions, where the user has at least one of the required roles.
sys_security_acl.name: x_taniu_tan_core_deploy_spkg
